exercise_requirement: Prepare a deterministic text dataset and loader with train-only fitting and stable validation transformation.
research_question: Does the text pipeline avoid validation vocabulary leakage and preserve grouped labels?
hypothesis: Train-only vocabulary fitting and deterministic validation batching will pass leakage and alignment checks.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
